en: When Balaam saw that it pleased the LORD to bless Israel, he did not go, as at other times, to look for omens, but set his face toward the wilderness.
zh: 巴蘭見耶和華喜歡賜福以色列，就不再像前兩次一樣去求觀兆的方法，卻面向曠野。

en: And Balaam lifted up his eyes and saw Israel camping tribe by tribe. And the Spirit of God came upon him,
zh: 巴蘭舉目，看見以色列人按著支派居住， 神的靈就臨到他身上。

en: and he took up his discourse and said, "The oracle of Balaam the son of Beor, the oracle of the man whose eye is opened,
zh: 他就作歌，說： “比珥的兒子巴蘭說： ‘有眼光的人說，

en: the oracle of him who hears the words of God, who sees the vision of the Almighty, falling down with his eyes uncovered:
zh: 得聽 神的話語、 得見全能者的異象、 身體仆倒而眼目睜開的人說：

en: How lovely are your tents, O Jacob, your encampments, O Israel!
zh: 雅各啊，你的會幕多麼佳美； 以色列啊，你的帳幕多麼美好！

en: Like palm groves that stretch afar, like gardens beside a river, like aloes that the LORD has planted, like cedar trees beside the waters.
zh: 像擴展的棕林， 如河邊的園子， 似耶和華栽種的沉香樹， 又像水旁的香柏樹。

en: Water shall flow from his buckets, and his seed shall be in many waters; his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.
zh: 必有水從他的桶中流出來， 他的後裔必在多水之處； 他的王必超過亞甲， 他的國度必被高舉。

en: God brings him out of Egypt and is for him like the horns of the wild ox; he shall eat up the nations, his adversaries, and shall break their bones in pieces and pierce them through with his arrows.
zh: 領他出埃及的 神， 對他好像野牛的角； 他要吞吃敵國， 打碎他們的骨頭， 用箭射透他們。

en: He crouched, he lay down like a lion and like a lioness; who will rouse him up? Blessed are those who bless you, and cursed are those who curse you."
zh: 他蹲伏躺下，好像公獅， 又像母獅，誰敢使他起立呢？ 給你祝福的，願他蒙福； 咒詛你的，願他受咒詛。’”

en: And Balak's anger was kindled against Balaam, and he struck his hands together. And Balak said to Balaam, "I called you to curse my enemies, and behold, you have blessed them these three times.
zh: 巴勒向巴蘭生氣，就拍起手；巴勒對巴蘭說：“我請你來咒詛我的敵人，如今你反倒祝福他們這三次。

en: Therefore now flee to your own place. I said, 'I will certainly honor you,' but the LORD has held you back from honor."
zh: 現在你逃回你的地方去吧；我說過我要大大地使你得尊榮，但是耶和華阻止你使你不得尊榮。”

en: And Balaam said to Balak, "Did I not tell your messengers whom you sent to me,
zh: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“我不是告訴了你派來的使者說：

en: 'If Balak should give me his house full of silver and gold, I would not be able to go beyond the word of the LORD, to do either good or bad of my own will. What the LORD speaks, that will I speak'?
zh: ‘就算巴勒把滿屋的金銀給我，我也不能越過耶和華的命令，隨自己的心意行好行歹’嗎？耶和華說甚麼，我就說甚麼。

en: And now, behold, I am going to my people. Come, I will let you know what this people will do to your people in the latter days."
zh: 現在我要回我本族去了；你來，我要告訴你這個民族日後要怎樣待你的人民。”

en: And he took up his discourse and said, "The oracle of Balaam the son of Beor, the oracle of the man whose eye is opened,
zh: 他就作歌，說： “比珥的兒子巴蘭說： ‘開著眼的人說，

en: the oracle of him who hears the words of God, and knows the knowledge of the Most High, who sees the vision of the Almighty, falling down with his eyes uncovered:
zh: 那得聽 神的話語、 明白至高者的知識、 得見全能者的異象、 身體仆倒而眼目睜開的人說：

en: I see him, but not now; I behold him, but not near: a star shall come out of Jacob, and a scepter shall rise out of Israel; it shall crush the forehead of Moab and break down all the sons of Sheth.
zh: 我看見他，卻不是現在； 我望見他，卻不是近處； 必有一星從雅各而出， 必有一杖從以色列興起； 他必打碎摩押的額角， 粉碎一切舍特人的頭頂。

en: Edom shall be dispossessed; Seir also, his enemies, shall be dispossessed. Israel is doing valiantly.
zh: 他必得以東作產業， 又得仇敵之地西珥作產業； 只有以色列人成為強壯。

en: And one from Jacob shall exercise dominion and destroy the survivors of cities!"
zh: 有一位從雅各而出的必掌大權， 他要除滅城中餘下的人。’”

en: Then he looked on Amalek and took up his discourse and said, "Amalek was the first among the nations, but its end is utter destruction."
zh: 巴蘭看見了亞瑪力，就作歌，說： “亞瑪力原是列國之首， 他的結局卻是滅亡。”

en: And he looked on the Kenite, and took up his discourse and said, "Enduring is your dwelling place, and your nest is set in the rock.
zh: 巴蘭看見了基尼人，就作歌，說： “你的居所堅固， 你的窩巢建在磐石中；

en: Nevertheless, Kain shall be burned when Asshur takes you away captive."
zh: 但基尼必被毀滅； 亞述要到幾時才把你擄去呢？”

en: And he took up his discourse and said, "Alas, who shall live when God does this?
zh: 巴蘭又作歌，說： “哀哉， 神決定這事，誰能得活呢？

en: But ships shall come from Kittim and shall afflict Asshur and Eber; and he too shall come to utter destruction."
zh: 必有船從基提而來， 苦害亞述，苦害希伯； 他卻要滅亡。”

en: Then Balaam rose and went back to his place. And Balak also went his way.
zh: 於是巴蘭起來，回自己的地方去；巴勒也回去了。
